A '''battle''', one of the opening engagements of the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]], was fought in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. Jedi Master [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] sent an elite contingent of [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC Troopers]] to infiltrate the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base. The unit recovered numerous artifacts before calling an airstrike.<ref name="NoP" />
